feedback.text: I respectfully request that the products I purchase digitally are treated the same as the products I purchase physically. Digital products I purchase are either: (a) Clearly labeled that this product will not work from a given time period (b) The product works going forward on the platform it was designed for and is available to me to continue using after the platform is depreciated (I do not expect support for newer platforms) and/or (c) the product's source code is released (at latest) at end of life.
